description: As per data retention policy, all operational records older than 7 years must be archived.

nodes.task_description: Run a query to identify all vessel visit records and container histories older than 7 years.

expected_outcome.expected: The admin generates a list of all records due for archiving.

nodes.task_description: Export the identified records from the live production database.

expected_outcome.expected: The old data is successfully exported into an archive file format.

nodes.task_description: Move the exported files to a long-term, low-cost storage solution and then delete them from the production database.

expected_outcome.expected: The data is successfully archived, and the production database is purged of the old records, improving performance.
